name: Corn, Tomato & Summer Squash Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Roasted Anaheim chile, peeled and seeded, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large deep pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and onion; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in chicken broth, tomatoes, corn, and chiles; simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Add zucchini and basil; continue to simmer for another 5 minutes.
5. Serve hot, garnished with sour cream and chopped cilantro.
